component.name: Marketwatch
component.summary: Real-time stock market ticker extention for the COSMIC desktop

description.p: Cosmic Marketwatch is an ext applet designed for the COSMIC desktop environment that provides real-time tracking of financial market data. It is lightweight, responsive, and fully integrated into the desktop panel, allowing users to monitor stock prices, cryptocurrencies, and other assets without opening a dedicated application.

The applet presents symbols and values in a clean and minimal interface, with support for price changes and color indicators reflecting gains or losses. This makes it quick and intuitive to read, ideal for users who want to keep track of the market throughout the day without distractions.

It also includes configuration options to customize tracked assets, adjust layout (horizontal or vertical), and choose between icon-only or detailed display modes. It is a practical tool for traders, investors, and anyone interested in keeping market data always visible.

ul.li: Fixes in app.metainfo.xml for Cosmic Store validation
Adjusted categories and icon for AppStream compatibility
Improvements to documentation and package metadata
Change applet name for trademark policy

description.p: Initial release of Cosmic Ext Marketwatch.

ul.li: Real-time market data from Yahoo Finance (no API key required)
Current price and percentage change displayed directly in the panel
Detailed popup with tabbed interface: Overview, Wallet, Alerts, and Settings
Configurable alerts: price thresholds, percentage changes, and trend changes
Desktop notifications when alert conditions are met
Latest news per asset via Yahoo Finance
Support for multiple currencies: USD, BRL, EUR, GBP, JPY, CHF, CAD, AUD, CNY, INR
Configurable update interval and rotation speed
Persistent configuration for portfolios and alerts
